title: Better Horse Steering
description: Better Horse Steering improves the way player control horses and other mobs like it, making the movement car like.
body:
# Better Horse Steering Better Horse Steering improves the way players control horses and other rideable land mobs, making their movement feel more like driving a car. In vanilla Minecraft, riding horses feels boring, stiff and hard to control, the horse always look at the same direction as the player, and right/left movements are so bad. This mod changes the steering mechanics. ## Recommended For Better Experience
# ## Features - Car-like steering system - The horse can now walk and sprint - Smooth head turning - More natural movement behavior - Modifed step sound system ## Affected Mobs

Horse
Skeleton Horse
Zombie Horse
Donkey

Mule
Camel
Camel Husk
In short, All the mobs that inheret from the ```AbstractHorseEntity``` class. ## How to Use The controls are simple and intuitive: - **W / S** → Move the mob forward or backward in the direction it is currently facing. - **A / D** → Smoothly rotate the mob left or right (like steering a car). - **Ctrl** → Sprint Instead of instantly changing the horse direction where the player is looking, now it rotates gradually, creating a more realistic and controlled riding experience. ## Why Use This Mod? If you enjoy traveling with rideable mobs like horses but find their movement awkward, **Better Horse Steering** gives you a more modern and intuitive control style.
